raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint Details What Happened * On XX/XX/year>, I booked a car rental reservation through American Express Travel with XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX. 
* The agreed rental terms were as follows : * Pick-Up Date/Time : XX/XX/scrub> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Drop-Off Date/Time : XX/XX/year>, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Rental Location : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Confirmation Number : XXXX * Approximate Price : {$1300.00} ( including taxes ). 
* However, I was charged {$2500.00}, which is significantly higher than the agreed amount and was not authorized by me. 

First Dispute Resolution * Account Ending : XXXX * Reference Number : XXXX * Merchant Name XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  * Transaction Amount : {$2500.00} * Dispute Outcome : American Express denied my dispute, claiming the charge was valid. 

Second Dispute Resolution * Account Ending : XXXX * Reference Number : XXXX * Merchant Name XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Transaction Amount : {$2500.00} * Dispute Outcome : * Amex stated that XXXX XXXX XXXX provided sufficient documentation to justify the charge. 
* According to the explanation, an extra charge was applied because the car was returned at XXXXXXXX XXXX instead of XXXXXXXX XXXX resulting in a higher total. 
* The merchant also claimed that a signed rental agreement reflected the total charge of {$2500.00}, including additional coverages. 

Why I Disagree 1. Agreed Price : The original confirmed price was {$1300.00}, including taxes. I did not authorize or approve any additional charges. 
2. Return Time Discrepancy : A 12-minute delay ( XXXXXXXX XXXX instead of XXXXXXXX XXXX  ) does not justify an overcharge of over {$1100.00}. 
3. Rental Agreement : I believe the merchant misrepresented the agreement to include unauthorized additional charges. I do not recall agreeing to any extra coverages or fees. They made it seem like the additional amount was a deposit that would be refunded to my account upon returning the vehicle. 

Rental Confirmation Details * Agency : XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Location : XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, FL XXXX * Confirmation Number : XXXX * Pick-Up Date/Time : XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Drop-Off Date/Time : XX/XX/year>, at XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX Approximate Price : {$1300.00} ( including taxes ). 

Supporting Evidence * The original booking confirmation showing the agreed price of {$1300.00}. ( Attached )
